title: rubus callimorphus
intro: Rubus callimorphus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry, is a type of plant that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rubus callimorphus include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and providing relief from fever and pain. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and respiratory problems.
